$comment: Cross-state pay summary for state DDS examiners and first-line supervisors. Two peer sets in scope: (1) population peers (states ~6-8M) for workload comparison; (2) bargaining peers (states with confirmed DDS examiner CBAs) for salary-comparison briefs. All annual figures are USD. Data quality varies — see 'data_quality' field per state. Supervisor figure for MA is from CTHRU actual-paid 2023 (Chief VDE chart-rate equivalent not yet extracted into pay-scales/); peer states are scheduled/contracted rates from official PDFs where extractable.
peer_bargaining_set_notes: Per _us-dds-union-landscape.md. The 9 states with confirmed CBAs are first; the rest have likely CBAs needing class-level verification. This pull added NY, CA, OR, MN, NJ, CT, HI to the data set on top of the original population peers; remaining bargaining peers (NV, IL, MI, AK, MT, ME, VT, PA) still need their own pulls.

tier1_bls_oews.reason: BLS HTML 403's WebFetch + curl; Wayback rate-limited (429); firecrawl out of credits. Need api.bls.gov registered key for series-ID pull.
tier1_bls_oews.fallback: Per-state class-spec data below carries the bargaining-table value without BLS.

MA.agency: MRC (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission), Disability Determination Services

examiner.title: Vocational Disability Examiner I/II/III (VDE)
examiner.scheduled_rate_source: SEIU 509 Unit 8 contract chart effective 2026-07-12
examiner.notes: Step 1 Grade 20 → Step 12 Grade 23 (FY2027). Bi-weekly chart-rate × 26.

supervisor.title: Chief Vocational Disability Examiner / VDE IV
supervisor.scheduled_rate_source: CTHRU actual-paid CY 2023 (chart-rate not yet extracted)
supervisor.notes: n=16 in CTHRU 2023; pre-July-2024 contract increase. Update to scheduled rate is a follow-up data task.

high_quality_observations: MA examiner peak (VDE III max, $115,429) is the highest in the high-quality peer group except MD supervisor max ($133,951).
MA examiner entry (VDE I step 1, $73,555) is higher than MD examiner entry ($62,220) and roughly tied with WA examiner peak (Adj 3 max, $84,984) — note: comparing entry vs. peak across grades.
VA pay bands are extremely wide and most useful via 'starting salary' DDS-internal rates ($54k Trainee → $105k Supervisor).
MN examiner pay ($51k–$74k under MAPE 2025-27) is meaningfully below MA's VDE I floor ($73k) — suggesting MA's bargained rate has out-paced MN's, despite both being unionized peer states.

NY/CA/CT/HI pay numbers were not extracted this session due to gateway-site blocking; these states' bargaining-unit context (PEF, SEIU 1000, AFSCME 714, HGEA Unit 13) IS confirmed and useful for the union-density argument even without scheduled rates.

OR Disability Analyst 1/2 (codes 5926/5927) + DA&A Mgr 3 (7193) scheduled-rate values — DAS portal is interactive-only (no static PDF); needs browser session
Remaining bargaining peers not yet pulled: AK, MT, ME, VT (per _us-dds-union-landscape.md Tier B/C)

NV state HR salary schedule (JS-only page) + AFSCME 4041 Aug 2024 contract terms
IL CMS pay plan + AFSCME Council 31 RC-62 schedule appendix (council31.org timed out, sites blocked)
MI MCSC class spec for examiner P-grade + SEIU 517M HSS schedule appendix (member portal)

manual_fetch_workflow_for_blocked_states.$comment: Each state below has a known gateway URL where the missing data lives. The blocking is automation-only; a human browser session retrieves the PDFs cleanly. Capturing the URLs here so a future session can either (a) ask the user to drop the PDFs into C:/temp/pdfs/peer2/ or (b) try a different fetch path (Wayback, browser MCP, etc.).

NY.target: PEF PS&T Salary Schedule effective 2025-04 (4% raise)
NY.notes: Look for SG-14 / SG-18 / SG-23 candidate grades; Disability Analyst series typically maps to SG-14 → SG-23

CA.target: CalHR Pay Scale section for DEA I/II/III + DEA Supervisor
CA.notes: Class codes are a 4-digit number; use the alpha index to find the DEA series

CT.target: CT DAS AR/AB Pay Plan with P-2 unit schedule
CT.notes: P-2 unit schedule is in the AFSCME contract appendix; SG-21/22/23 is the typical examiner range

HI.notes: BU 13 uses SR (Salary Range) numbering; Disability Determination Examiner likely SR-22 to SR-24

NJ.target: NJ CSC pay table for Job Spec #64947 + CWA 2023-2027 salary appendix
NJ.notes: Search NJ CSC for spec 64947; CWA Local 1036 maintains the contract pay tables

OR.target: OR DAS Compensation Plan for Class 5926 / 5927 / 7193
OR.notes: OR portal is interactive; class codes are confirmed (5926, 5927, 7193) so just need the salary range lookup for each

PA.target: PA OA Standard Pay Schedule (verify SC-09, SC-10, SC-11 ranges) + SEIU 668 Master Agreement Appendix
PA.notes: PA OA pay schedule PDFs require login; SEIU 668 contract PDF link not exposed in HTML — may need member portal or direct request

NV.target: NV State HR Salary Schedule + AFSCME 4041 August 2024 CBA terms
NV.notes: hr.nv.gov salary page is JavaScript-rendered; AFSCME 4041 Aug 2024 contract is the newest DDS CBA in country — useful precedent context

IL.target: IL CMS Pay Plan + AFSCME Council 31 RC-62 contract appendix
IL.notes: council31.org timed out via curl; CMS PDFs not directly addressed; try archive.org if direct paths continue to fail

MI.target: MI Civil Service Commission class spec for Disability Examiner + SEIU 517M HSS contract
MI.notes: MI MCSC class spec lookup is JS-driven; SEIU 517M contracts page lists docs but PDFs may be member-only
